# Travel Hacking Toolkit

> A comprehensive toolkit for searching flights, hotels, and award availability across multiple sources. Combines cash pricing (Duffel, Ignav), award search (seats.aero), portal pay-with-points (Chase UR, Amex MR), corporate-perks pricing (TicketsAtWork), and transfer partner optimization into unified comparison tools. Designed for use by AI coding assistants and agents (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex).

Key concepts:
- **Cash prices** come from GDS feeds (Duffel, Ignav) and are bookable fares
- **Award prices** come from loyalty program availability (seats.aero) and require transferring credit card points
- **Portal prices** come from Chase and Amex travel portals and let you pay with UR/MR points directly
- **Corporate-perks prices** come from EBG-backed sites (TicketsAtWork, Working Advantage, Plum, Beneplace) and often beat public rates 10-30%
- **Transfer partners** map credit card points to airline/hotel loyalty programs at various ratios
- **CPP (cents per point)** measures redemption value. Higher CPP = better use of points

## Unified Comparison (start here)

- [Trip Planner](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/trip-planner/SKILL.md): Full trip planning. Flights + hotels + points optimization in one shot.
- [Compare Flights](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/compare-flights/SKILL.md): Orchestrates all flight sources in parallel. Applies transfer partner optimization automatically.
- [Compare Hotels](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/compare-hotels/SKILL.md): Orchestrates all hotel sources including Airbnb. Identifies premium program stacking opportunities.
- [Award Calendar](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/award-calendar/SKILL.md): Find cheapest award dates for a route over a date range. Calendar grid view.

## Flight Sources

- [Duffel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/duffel/SKILL.md): Primary cash prices. Real GDS fares with fare classes. No Southwest.
- [Ignav](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/ignav/SKILL.md): Fast REST API for cash prices. Good for comparison.
- [Seats.aero](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/seats-aero/SKILL.md): Award flight availability across 25+ mileage programs.
- [Chase Travel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/chase-travel/SKILL.md): Chase UR portal. Points Boost detection, Edit hotel benefits. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/chase-travel`.
- [Amex Travel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/amex-travel/SKILL.md): Amex MR portal. IAP discount detection, FHR/THC hotels. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/amex-travel`.
- [Southwest](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/southwest/SKILL.md): All 4 fare classes, cash + points pricing. Change-flight price drop monitor. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/sw-fares`.
- [Google Flights](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/google-flights/SKILL.md): Browser-automated. All airlines including Southwest cash.
- [SerpAPI](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/serpapi/SKILL.md): Google Flights cash prices, Google Hotels, destination discovery.

## Hotel Sources

- [Premium Hotels](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/premium-hotels/SKILL.md): Search FHR (1,807), THC (1,299), and Chase Edit (1,553) properties by city. Local data, no API.
- [TicketsAtWork](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/ticketsatwork/SKILL.md): EBG corporate-perks portal (also Working Advantage, Plum, Beneplace). Hotels + theme park tickets + live events. Often beats portals 10-30%. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/ticketsatwork`.
- [TripAdvisor](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/tripadvisor/SKILL.md): Hotel ratings, restaurant search, attraction reviews, nearby search.
- [SerpAPI](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/serpapi/SKILL.md): Google Hotels metasearch.
- [RapidAPI](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/rapidapi/SKILL.md): Booking.com inventory.

## Points Optimization

- [Transfer Partners](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/transfer-partners/SKILL.md): Find cheapest transfer path from credit card points to loyalty programs.
- [Trip Calculator](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/trip-calculator/SKILL.md): Cash vs points decision framework with CPP analysis and opportunity cost.
- [WhereToCredit](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/wheretocredit/SKILL.md): Mileage earning rates by airline and booking class.

## Loyalty and Status

- [AwardWallet](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/awardwallet/SKILL.md): Query loyalty program balances and elite status.
- [American Airlines](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/american-airlines/SKILL.md): AAdvantage balance check (not in AwardWallet). Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/aa-miles-check`.

## Travel Planning

- [Atlas Obscura](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/atlas-obscura/SKILL.md): Hidden gems and unusual attractions by destination.
- [Scandinavia Transit](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/scandinavia-transit/SKILL.md): Train, bus, ferry routes within Norway (Entur), Sweden (ResRobot), Denmark (Rejseplanen). Denmark includes fare/zone pricing.
- [Seatmaps](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/seatmaps/SKILL.md): Aircraft seat maps and cabin dimensions.

## Reference and Operations (auto-load on demand)

These skills carry institutional knowledge that the agent loads when triggered. They cover the workflow rules, reference tables, failure recovery, and lessons learned that prevent the most common mistakes.

- [Flight Search Strategy](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/flight-search-strategy/SKILL.md): Canonical multi-source search workflow, source priority order, market selection, source accuracy hierarchy.
- [Lessons Learned](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/lessons-learned/SKILL.md): Hard-won knowledge from real searches. REQUIRED before any award flight search. Includes the mandatory Seats.aero workflow (pull ALL programs first), Southwest specifics, Companion Pass math, source-accuracy rankings, small-market caveats, Duffel limitations.
- [Points Valuations](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/points-valuations/SKILL.md): CPP floor/ceiling rules, surcharge-heavy programs, transfer bonuses, portal rate dynamics (Chase Points Boost), opportunity cost.
- [Partner Awards](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/partner-awards/SKILL.md): Which programs ticket which airlines (alliance + bilateral). Reachability through credit card transfer paths.
- [Alliances](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/alliances/SKILL.md): Star Alliance, oneworld, SkyTeam membership and recent shifts.
- [Award Sweet Spots](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/award-sweet-spots/SKILL.md): Catalog of legendary, excellent, and good redemptions with current rates and devaluation history.
- [Cabin Codes](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/cabin-codes/SKILL.md): IATA cabin codes (F/J/W/Y) and saver fare class codes (X/I/O) for partner-bookable inventory.
- [Hotel Chains](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/hotel-chains/SKILL.md): Brand to loyalty program mapping (Westin -> Bonvoy, Holiday Inn -> IHG, etc.).
- [Fallback and Resilience](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/fallback-and-resilience/SKILL.md): Tool-by-tool fallback paths when sources fail.
- [Booking Guidance](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/booking-guidance/SKILL.md): Booking flow, "hold before transfer" rule, phone numbers for major programs.

## Docker Images

All images are public on GitHub Container Registry. Pull with `docker pull ghcr.io/borski/<name>:latest`.

- `ghcr.io/borski/patchright-docker`: Base image. Patchright + Chromium + xvfb. All other browser-skill images build on this.
- `ghcr.io/borski/sw-fares`: Southwest skill (search + change-flight monitor).
- `ghcr.io/borski/aa-miles-check`: American Airlines skill (AAdvantage balance + status).
- `ghcr.io/borski/chase-travel`: Chase UR travel portal.
- `ghcr.io/borski/amex-travel`: Amex MR travel portal.
- `ghcr.io/borski/ticketsatwork`: TaW / Working Advantage / Plum / Beneplace EBG portal.

## Data Files

Local JSON data referenced by skills. No API keys required.

- [Transfer Partners](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/transfer-partners.json): Credit card to loyalty program transfer ratios from 6 issuers.
- [Points Valuations](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/points-valuations.json): CPP floor/ceiling per program from 4 sources (TPG, Upgraded Points, OMAAT, VFTW).
- [Alliances](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/alliances.json): Star Alliance, oneworld, SkyTeam membership and key booking relationships.
- [Partner Awards](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/partner-awards.json): Which programs ticket which airlines, including cross-alliance bilateral partnerships.
- [Sweet Spots](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/sweet-spots.json): Legendary, excellent, and good award redemptions plus airline release windows.
- [Hotel Chains](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/hotel-chains.json): Brand to loyalty program mapping with quick-lookup index.
- [FHR Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/fhr-properties.json): Amex Fine Hotels & Resorts property database with coordinates and benefits.
- [THC Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/thc-properties.json): Amex The Hotel Collection property database.
- [Chase Edit Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/chase-edit-properties.json): Chase Sapphire Reserve Hotel Collection properties.

## Optional

- [RapidAPI](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/rapidapi/SKILL.md): Booking.com hotel prices. Secondary source.
- [Google Flights](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/google-flights/SKILL.md): Browser-automated fallback for Southwest or when APIs fail.
</content>
</invoke>
